items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of SQL injection attempts in text fields, but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or testing of this specific scenario. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any details or results related to SQL injection testing, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence of how the system handles SQL injection attempts, it is impossible to determine if the expected result is met.
